rules.title: Sudoku Rules
rules.basicRule2: Each row must contain digits 1-9 exactly once
rules.basicRule3: Each column must contain digits 1-9 exactly once
rules.basicRule4: Each 3×3 box must contain digits 1-9 exactly once
rules.example: As shown: no repeated digits in any row, column, or box

auth.passwordShort: Password must be at least 3 characters

about.title: About Sudoku
about.intro: Sudoku is a worldwide popular logic-based puzzle game. Players fill a 9×9 grid with digits 1-9 so that each row, each column, and each 3×3 box contains all digits exactly once. Sudoku requires no math — just pure logical reasoning — making it perfect for all ages to train the brain.
about.rowDesc: The board has 9 rows, numbered from top to bottom. Each row must contain digits 1-9 exactly once.
about.colDesc: The board has 9 columns, numbered from left to right. Each column must contain digits 1-9 exactly once.
about.boxDesc: The board is divided into 9 3×3 boxes. Each box must contain digits 1-9 exactly once. This is the most distinctive rule of Sudoku.
about.videoDesc: Quickly learn the basic rules and how to play Sudoku through video
about.videoPlaceholderDesc: Pick one of the recommended beginner tutorials below, or search Bilibili for your favorite and send me the link — I'll embed it for you.
about.videoNote: Click the button above to watch in a new window
about.videoTip: Tip: Send me the BV number of the video you want, and I'll embed it directly on the homepage
